title: helianthemum pilosum subsp. strictum
intro: Helianthemum pilosum subsp. strictum, also known as the rockrose or sunrose, is a perennial plant species within the Helianthemum genus. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Helianthemum pilosum subsp. strictum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antibacterial and antifungal activities. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems.
